mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_account_display ad ON rr.user_account_id = ad.account_id
AND ad.nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND ad.handle LIKE '%' || #{handle} || '%'
AND rr.status = #{status}
AND rr.pay_type = #{payType}
AND rr.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND rr.created_at < TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT rr.reservation_id AS reservationId, rr.user_account_id AS userAccountId, u.profile_image_url AS userProfileImageUrl, u.nickname, u.handle, u.role_type AS roleType, rr.status, rr.pay_type AS payType, TO_CHAR(vr.slot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS slotDate, TO_CHAR(vr.reservation_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationStartTime, TO_CHAR(vr.reservation_end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationEndTime, vr.room_id AS roomId, vr.center_name AS centerName, rr.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, t.nickname AS trainerNickname, t.handle AS trainerHandle, t.profile_image_url AS trainerProfileImageUrl, rr.counts, rr.base_fee_snapshot AS baseFeeSnapshot, rr.price_snapshot AS priceSnapshot, rr.total_price_snapshot AS totalPriceSnapshot, TO_CHAR(rr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_account_display u ON rr.user_account_id = u.account_id LEFT JOIN vw_account_display t ON rr.trainer_account_id = t.account_id LEFT JOIN vw_reservation_base vr ON rr.reservation_id = vr.reservation_id WHERE rr.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE room_reservation SET status = 'NO_SHOW' WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
UPDATE pass_usage_history SET reason = 'NO_SHOW' WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND reason = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vw_user_pass up
AND up.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND up.user_handle LIKE '%' || #{handle} || '%'
AND up.status = #{status}
AND up.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND up.created_at < TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT up.pass_id AS passId, up.user_account_id AS userAccountId, up.user_profile_image_url AS userProfileImageUrl, up.user_nickname AS nickname, up.user_handle AS handle, 'USER' AS roleType, up.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, up.trainer_profile_image_url AS trainerProfileImageUrl, up.trainer_nickname AS trainerNickname, up.trainer_handle AS trainerHandle, 'TRAINER' AS trainerRoleType, up.status, up.total_count_snapshot AS totalCountSnapshot, up.remaining_count AS remainingCount, up.base_fee_snapshot AS baseFeeSnapshot, up.price_snapshot AS priceSnapshot, TO_CHAR(up.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM vw_user_pass up WHERE up.pass_id = #{passId}

SELECT usage_id AS usageId, reservation_id AS reservationId, status AS reservationStatus, center_name AS centerName, TO_CHAR(slot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS slotDate, TO_CHAR(reservation_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationStartTime, TO_CHAR(reservation_end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationEndTime, counts_snapshot AS countsSnapshot, reason, TO_CHAR(used_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS usedAt FROM vw_pass_usage_history WHERE pass_id = #{passId} ORDER BY used_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment p JOIN vw_account_display ad ON p.account_id = ad.account_id
AND ad.nickname LIKE '%' || #{nickname} || '%'
AND ad.handle LIKE '%' || #{handle} || '%'
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.created_at < TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, p.account_id AS accountId, ad.nickname, ad.handle, ad.role_type AS roleType, p.status, p.reservation_id AS reservationId, TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, p.original_amount AS originalAmount, p.discount_amount AS discountAmount, p.final_amount AS finalAmount, TO_CHAR(p.paid_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS paidAt, TO_CHAR(p.expire_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS expireAt, p.kakao_tid AS kakaoTid, vr.center_name AS centerName, TO_CHAR(vr.slot_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS slotDate, TO_CHAR(vr.reservation_start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationStartTime, TO_CHAR(vr.reservation_end_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reservationEndTime, vr.reservation_status AS reservationStatus FROM payment p JOIN vw_account_display ad ON p.account_id = ad.account_id LEFT JOIN vw_reservations_payment vr ON p.payment_id = vr.payment_id WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUNDED' WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND status = 'PAID'
UPDATE room_reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE reservation_id = ( SELECT reservation_id FROM payment WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} )
mapper.select: SELECT center_name FROM centers ORDER BY center_name
